title: Minedown
description: Adds markdown-like formatting to the chat!
body:
# Minedown
Markdown in my Minecraft? Its more likely than you think

**Minedown** is a server-side mod that formats sent chat messages using a markdown-like syntax

## Supported styles
- Italics - surround text with `*` to make it *italic*
- Bold - surround text with `**` to make it **bold**
- Underline - surround text with `_` to underline it
- Strikethrough - surround text with `~~` to add ~~strikethrough~~
- Obfuscation - surround text with `?!` to obfuscate it

## Planned style support
- Color
- Links
- Obfuscation with hover-to-reveal (spoiler-like)

## Frequently Anticipated Questions
### Do I need to install this client-side?
No, it runs entirely server-side and vanilla clients can connect to servers with only this mod installed

### Will I still see the formatting though?
Yes, the server will format the text and broadcast it to all players in its formatted form

### Will you add [insert feature]?
Maybe. If it's in the `Planned style support` section, probably at some point.
If it's not, submit a feature request on the [Codeberg issues page](https://codeberg.org/jolkert/minedown/issues)
or [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/G3pqGwydVd) and I'll consider it
